UPSONIC_WORKERS_AMOUNT.description: The number of workers for the Upsonic API

API_WORKERS.description: The number of workers for the Upsonic API

RUNNER_CONCURRENCY.description: The number of runners for the Upsonic API

description: AI agent team that monitors loan covenant compliance by extracting covenant definitions from agreements, calculating financial ratios with custom tools, and assessing breach risk using coordinated specialist agents

loan_agreement_path.description: Path to the loan agreement text file (required)

financial_data_path.description: Path to the financial data JSON file (required)

focus_areas.description: Optional list of priority focus areas for the analysis

enable_memory.description: Whether to enable in-memory session persistence

model.description: Model identifier for the coordinator agent (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5, openai/gpt-4o)

print.description: If true, do() prints output; if false, print_do() does not. Overridden by UPSONIC_AGENT_PRINT env.

report.description: Full CovenantMonitoringReport with covenants, ratios, compliance results, risk assessment, executive summary, and next steps

monitoring_completed.description: Whether the monitoring process completed successfully
